description: Deterministic semantic contract suite for context legality behavior in sv_stimuli_quality_gate.

cases.name: generate_for_with_genvar_pass
cases.input: module top; genvar i; generate for (i = 0; i < 4; i = i + 1) begin : g logic x; end endgenerate endmodule

cases.name: generate_for_without_genvar_fail
cases.input: module top; int i; generate for (i = 0; i < 2; i = i + 1) begin : g logic x; end endgenerate endmodule

cases.name: always_comb_without_event_control_pass
cases.input: module top; logic a; logic b; always_comb begin b = a; end endmodule

cases.name: always_comb_with_event_control_fail
cases.input: module top; logic a; logic b; always_comb begin @(posedge a) b = a; end endmodule

cases.name: always_ff_nonblocking_pass
cases.input: module top; logic clk; logic d; logic q; always_ff @(posedge clk) begin q <= d; end endmodule

cases.name: always_ff_blocking_fail
cases.input: module top; logic clk; logic d; logic q; always_ff @(posedge clk) begin q = d; end endmodule

cases.name: multiple_genvar_declarations_pass
cases.input: module top; genvar i, j; generate for (i = 0; i < 2; i = i + 1) begin : gi end for (j = 0; j < 2; j = j + 1) begin : gj end endgenerate endmodule

cases.name: comment_noise_context_pass
cases.input:
module top; // always_ff with nonblocking should pass
logic clk; logic q; logic d; always_ff @(posedge clk) begin /* no blocking */ q <= d; end endmodule
